Good game but 
Can’t play multiplayer and I can’t load and suits

I know many people are having problems with this but I wait for about ten minutes for a game to start but it says it's having a hard time logging in, it restart my internet and it says rooms full try again FIX THIS PLZ DEVS I BEG YOU!!!!
Im stuck in the lobby and i cannot play
Was stuck in this spawn room and couldn’t do squat but beat up some random npc
Sometimes my web shooters will not work and they will not work
When I put in a certain code that my friend is in it doesn't load.. But overall it's an incredible game!
Idk
The game is fun but fix the loading problem

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting me know about the issue! I'll be releasing an update shortly to fix it!

reviews.review_title: I CANT WHEN CREATE A ROOM
reviews.review_description: This game is crap! I can’t even create￼ a room to play in. I can do everything else in the lobby, I can bend purchase skins but in unable to make a room to play in. WHAT IS THIS! You sell you game as fun, and I believe you but when I can’t even play the game, that’s not fun…!

developer_response.body: You just have to enter a room code and click create room, or you can click on a room in the room list on the side and you'll join it instantly! :)

reviews.review_description: W Game
Can never join a room bc it says servers are full

I think this game is like spiderman I love spiderman.             




Thank you owner
I like it but I go into the starter room and I can’t get out idk if it’s glitch or part of the game and what do the figures mean
It’s the worst spider man game but you tried

reviews.review_title: Why this used to be bad but is now good
reviews.review_description: I was so annoyed when I couldn’t play the game in the previous update and I deleted the whole app itself. I then heard of a new update which I got really happy cause I wanted to try and I pop into the lobby. I swing myself up to the portal and.. OH MY GOSH!!! IT WORKS!! WOW. THIS IS SO FUN!!! was my exact reaction when it finally worked. I think the developers have done an outstanding job fixing bugs here and there. Even though we can’t use multiplayer, I think this game is amazing, even by yourself.
when i load into it the computer comes up with a message saying it cant log me in now i can’t play the game at all
